basics.name: Jane Doe
basics.label: Senior Platform Engineer
basics.summary: Senior platform engineer with 12 years of distributed-systems experience. Specialises in Kubernetes operators, event-sourcing pipelines, and SRE practice.

work.name: Acme Corp
highlights: Led migration of 14-service estate to Kubernetes; cut P95 latency 40 %.
Designed event-sourcing pipeline handling 12M events/day with 99.95 % SLO.
Mentored 4 junior engineers through senior promotion.

work.name: Globex Ltd
highlights: Built the PostgreSQL connection-pooling service that backs all internal APIs.
Rolled out OpenTelemetry tracing across 32 services.
